scripts.ci: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build && npm audit --audit-level=moderate

scriptDescriptions.dev: Starts backend and frontend Nx dev targets together for local development.
scriptDescriptions.build: Builds shared first, then backend and frontend, using Nx dependency ordering.
scriptDescriptions.test: Runs all Nx test targets across frontend, backend, and shared.
scriptDescriptions.lint: Runs ESLint through Nx for every configured project.
scriptDescriptions.typecheck: Runs TypeScript type checking for every configured project.
scriptDescriptions.affected: Runs the base Nx affected command for changed projects.
scriptDescriptions.affected:build: Builds only projects affected by the current changes.
scriptDescriptions.affected:test: Tests only projects affected by the current changes.
scriptDescriptions.affected:lint: Lints only projects affected by the current changes.
scriptDescriptions.dep-graph: Opens the Nx project dependency graph in the browser.
scriptDescriptions.storybook: Starts the frontend Storybook component workshop.
scriptDescriptions.build:storybook: Builds the static frontend Storybook site.
scriptDescriptions.cms:dev: Starts the independent Sanity Studio app from app/cms.
scriptDescriptions.cms:build: Builds the Sanity Studio static output.
scriptDescriptions.cms:start: Runs the Sanity Studio production start command.
scriptDescriptions.cms:deploy: Runs the Sanity Studio deploy command.
scriptDescriptions.ci: Runs the full local quality gate: format, lint, typecheck, tests, build, and audit.
scriptDescriptions.docker:build: Builds all Docker images defined in docker-compose.yml.
scriptDescriptions.docker:up: Builds and starts the full Docker stack.
scriptDescriptions.docker:down: Stops and removes Docker compose services.
scriptDescriptions.docker:api: Builds and starts only the backend Docker service.
scriptDescriptions.docker:web: Builds and starts only the frontend Docker service.
scriptDescriptions.docker:cms: Builds and starts only the CMS Docker service.
scriptDescriptions.format:check: Checks repository formatting without changing files.
scriptDescriptions.prepare: Installs Husky git hooks after npm install.
